data.body: S4 Engine B implemented (new files only; sibling-package files untouched per integration plan). Created src/rebar/grounding/detectors/ (registry.py: discovery/parse/mtime-cache/last-wins override/fail-open; __init__.py) + builtin/ (4 detectors: opengrep js-console-log smell, web-frontend applies, ast-grep js-debugger smell, metric oversize) + engine_b.py (OpenGrep primary w/ engine-faithful --validate quarantine + SARIF via S1 sarif.from_sarif; ast-grep secondary scan --json; metric scc/lizard fail-open-to-no_tool with project-overridable thresholds; self-declared applicability routing -> skipped+coverage when lang/files absent; every backend in harness recover boundary; version pinned). tests/unit/grounding/test_engine_b.py: 13 tests, REAL semgrep+ast-grep, incl. the spike-E1 key test (invalid detector quarantined, scan NOT aborted, good built-in still matches). Results: 13/13 pass; full grounding suite 123/123 pass; mypy clean on engine_b.py + detectors/. KEY FINDING: semgrep strips custom metadata from SARIF AND path-namespaces rule ids -> engine_b re-injects rebar_envelope into SARIF rule.properties + rewrites engine ids back to declared namespaced ids (dot-suffix match) before handing to sarif.from_sarif. Provisional dimension vocab {web_frontend,has_iac,touches_auth,smell_generic} w/ TODO(S5/55de). Not transitioned — awaiting your review.
